chunks.text: On the morning of the sports day
the schoolyard was full of children 's cheerful voices.
For each grade, there were many races and matches.
In the class race, I ran with all my energy.
On the last straight, I could see two runners in front of me.
“ I will not give up,” I said to myself, and ran toward the goal.
At the next event, my brother threw a ball high
and his friend caught it firmly.
” a big cheer rose into the blue sky.
From far away, I could hear the sound of a soccer ball being hit strongly.
The boys were chasing the ball happily, and even when they fell
Having fun is the most important thing,” our teacher said kindly.
My sister became the first in the race and wore a big gold medal on her chest.
As a first time winner, she looked proud all day.
